name: Ignatius Filbert Sevilen
title: Full Stack Engineer
subtitle: AI Integration Specialist
valueProposition: Architecting high-performance web systems and AI-driven automation. I combine full-stack engineering with scalable backend infrastructure to deliver secure, data-intensive digital products.
bio: Full Stack Engineer with expertise in building scalable, user-focused web applications and AI-driven solutions. Proficient in both front-end and back-end technologies, including Next.js, Vue.js, Angular, Express.js, Flask, and .NET. Eager to contribute to innovative projects by delivering high-quality, efficient, and maintainable solutions that drive business growth and solve complex technical challenges.
bioParagraphs: Full Stack Engineer with expertise in building scalable, user-focused web applications and AI-driven solutions.
Proficient in both front-end and back-end technologies, including Next.js, Vue.js, Angular, Express.js, Flask, and .NET.

Eager to contribute to innovative projects by delivering high-quality, efficient, and maintainable solutions that drive business growth, improve user experience, and solve complex technical challenges in a collaborative environment.
